Lemma binint_add_assoc_pos p n m : pos p + (n + m) = pos p + n + m.

goals.conclusion: pos p + (n + m) = pos p + n + m

binint_pos_sub (m + n)%pos p = - neg m + binint_pos_sub n p
pos p + (neg n + 0) = pos p + neg n + 0
pos p + neg n + 0 = pos p + (neg n + 0)
